title: DB Layer Attachments
description: list_attachments(db, email_id) - returns AttachmentInfo list, handles both schemas (legacy: filename_fld BLOB with decode, modern: name TEXT). extract_attachment(db, email_id, attachment_idx, output_dir) - extracts to file. Legacy: attach_fld BLOB, Modern: data BLOB (nullable). Tests for both schemas.

title: Parallel Search
description: ThreadPoolExecutor for cross-DB search when --db not specified. Rich Progress bar showing per-DB progress. Merge results sorted by date. Graceful error handling per DB (log warning, continue with others).

title: Polish + Install
description: Error handling polish, first-run guidance when config missing, uv tool install for global availability. Verify all commands work against real DBs in /Users/malte/MailSteward/. Final pytest run.

title: Project Scaffold
description: Repo init, pyproject.toml, uv init, msq/__init__.py, tests/__init__.py, msq --help funktioniert. Entry point: msq = msq.cli:app
close_reason: Scaffold done: cli.py, __init__.py, tests, msq --help works

title: CLI: attachments, extract, stats
description: Wire up: msq attachments <db> <id> (list attachments for email), msq extract <db> <id> (extract attachments to --output dir, default cwd), msq stats <db> (detailed stats: mailbox counts, top senders, date distribution). CliRunner tests.

title: CLI: dbs, search, show
description: Wire up main commands: msq dbs (list all DBs with stats), msq search <query> (full-text search with --db/--from/--to/--subject/--body/--date-from/--date-to/--has-attachments/--limit/--format options), msq show <db> <id> (display single email detail). Typer app with no_args_is_help, version command.

title: Output Module
description: Rich tables/panels for all output types. OutputFormat enum (TABLE/JSON/CSV). Functions: output_databases (table with count, date range, size, schema), output_emails (search results table), output_email_detail (Rich Panel with full mail), output_attachments (table), output_stats (panels with mailbox/sender/date stats). console and err_console. print_success/error/warning/info helpers.
close_reason: Output module mit TABLE/JSON/CSV, Rich panels, 20 Tests passing

title: DB Layer Core
description: open_db (read-only file URI), detect_schema (PRAGMA table_info - emailid col = modern), decode_filename (bytes->str), discover_databases (SQLite magic bytes check in db_dir), search_emails (query builder with from/to/subject/body/date-range filters, NEVER select body_fld in list, LIMIT), get_email (full detail with body). In-memory SQLite fixtures for both schemas.

title: Models
description: Dataclasses: EmailResult (id, from, to, subject, date, mailbox, has_attachments - NO body), EmailDetail (full email with body), AttachmentInfo (id, filename, size), DatabaseInfo (name, path, email_count, date_range, size_bytes, schema_type), DatabaseStats (mailbox counts, sender counts, date distribution). All with to_dict().

title: Config Module
description: XDG config ~/.config/msq/config.toml. Load/write TOML config with db_dir and aliases section. DB-Resolution: alias -> name -> case-insensitive match. load_config(), resolve_db() functions. Tests with tmp_path.
close_reason: Config module mit TOML load/save/resolve, 13 Tests passing
